title: Children of Paradise
tmdbOverview: In a chaotic 19th-century Paris teeming with aristocrats, thieves, psychics, and courtesans, theater mime Baptiste is in love with the mysterious actress Garance. But Garance, in turn, is loved by three other men: pretentious actor Frederick, conniving thief Lacenaire, and Count Edouard of Montray.
synopsis: Children of Paradise (1945) is a drama and romance film from France. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.3 on IMDb. A standout of 1940s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 14 certification (BE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
